nodes.name: Actinodura
nodes.summary: Actinodura（Actinodura）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如纹头斑翅鹛、台湾斑翅鹛、纹胸斑翅鹛等9种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栗额斑翅鹛
nodes.summary: 栗额斑翅鹛（Actinodura egertoni）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如栗额斑翅鹛。

nodes.name: 栗额斑翅鹛
nodes.summary: The rusty-fronted barwing (Actinodura egertoni) is a species of bird in the laughingthrush family, Leiothrichidae. It is found in Southeast Asia from the Himalayas to north-eastern Myanmar. Its natural habitats are temperate forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. Gallery References Collar, N. J. & Robson C. 2007. Family Timaliidae (Babblers) pp. 70 – 291 in; del Hoyo, J., Elliott, A. & Christie, D.A. eds. Handbook of the Birds of the World, Vol. 12. Picathartes to Tits and Chickadees. Lynx Edicions, Barcelona.
